data.title: ETHZilla is making a big bet on Ethereum’s stablecoin play, aiming to work with layer-2 protocols for higher yields.
data.description: The CEO of ETHZilla has announced plans for the Ethereum treasury company to collaborate with layer-2 protocols in order to achieve a greater yield than what they currently receive from staking.

data.title: Robert Belsky named Inner Circle Lifetime Member; VP for a 37-store, 3-banner supermarket chain with 8,000+ employees.
data.description: In Egg Harbor Township, New Jersey, as of October 2, 2025, Robert Belsky holds the position of Vice President of Operations at a regional supermarket chain consisting of 37 stores across three banners. The chain employs a workforce of over 8,000 associates. Bob has an extensive background in the grocery sector, spanning over 44 years, and he began his career as a part-time cashier before progressing to his current role.

data.title: Rachaele Carver Morin is recognized as a Pinnacle Professional Member in Dentistry by The Inner Circle.
data.description: In North Adams, Massachusetts on October 2, 2025, Dr. Rachaele Carver Morin, a distinguished professional with titles including DMD, NMD, IABDM, AIAOMT, and CHC, has been recognized in The Inner Circle as a Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence for her outstanding contributions to the field of Dentistry. With over twenty years of experience, Dr. Morin is commended for her expertise and achievements in this specialized area of healthcare.

data.title: Dr. Moumine Ballo recognized as Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence for contributions in Computer Graphics.
data.description: On October 2, 2025, in San Jose, California, Dr. Moumine Ballo was acknowledged in The Inner Circle as a distinguished Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence for his significant work in Computer Graphics and Electronics Engineering. Dr. Ballo's accomplishments include advancements in the field, establishing him as a leading figure in the industry.

data.title: Rev. Mother Marie Therese Ego Okpala recognized as Top Professional by The Inner Circle for her contributions to Spiritual and Psychological Healing for Families in Need.
data.description: On October 2, 2025, in Los Angeles, Marie Therese Ego Okpala was recognized in The Inner Circle as a leading professional for her work in Spiritual and Psychological Healing for Families in Need. Reverend Mother Marie Therese Ego Okpala has been acknowledged for her contributions in this field.

data.title: Vistra gets FERC approval for acquiring 7 gas generation facilities.  #Vistra #FERC #acquisition
data.description: In Irving, Texas on October 2, 2025, Vistra (NYSE: VST) disclosed receiving approval from the Federal Energy Regulatory Commission (FERC) for its planned acquisition of particular subsidiaries with ownership of seven up-to-date natural gas generation plants.

data.title: Join ASES in celebrating Solar Tour Showcase Weekend on Oct. 3-5, 2025 to explore renewable energy across the country.
data.description: The American Solar Energy Society (ASES) is hosting the National Solar Tour Showcase Weekend from October 3-5, 2025, in Boulder, Colo. During this event, solar and sustainable system owners nationwide will open their doors to the public, showcasing renewable energy in action. Hundreds of participants from diverse locations across the country will demonstrate the benefits and practicality of solar energy, contributing to the growing interest and adoption of renewable energy sources. This event offers individuals the opportunity to witness firsthand how solar technology is being utilized by a large number of households and businesses, showcasing its potential in addressing energy needs sustainably.

data.title: Vireo Growth Inc. acquires Schwazze's senior secured convertible notes in upcoming transaction, part of M&A strategy.
data.description: Vireo's latest merger and acquisition move, set to finalize this month, underscores the company's ongoing M&A strategy.

data.title: FRC's Tony Perkins criticizes FDA for approving generic abortion drug mifepristone before govt shutdown.
data.description: On October 2, 2025, Tony Perkins, President of the Family Research Council, responded to the FDA's approval of a generic version of the abortion pill mifepristone just before the government shutdown. Perkins expressed disapproval of the decision, emphasizing the timing of the approval.
